# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: '[resourceGroup().location]'
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources.
  appNamePrefix:
    type: string
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 10
    metadata:
      description: A unique prefix for the application resources. Max 10 characters.
  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
    minLength: 1
    metadata:
      description: Administrator login for the SQL server.
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    minLength: 8
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the SQL server.
variables:
  # Resource Naming
  appServicePlanName: '[format(''{0}plan'', parameters(''appNamePrefix''))]'
  webAppName: '[format(''{0}webapp'', parameters(''appNamePrefix''))]'
  sqlServerName: '[format(''{0}sqlserver'', parameters(''appNamePrefix''))]'
  sqlDatabaseName: '[format(''{0}sqldb'', parameters(''appNamePrefix''))]'
  storageAccountName: '[format(''{0}stg'', parameters(''appNamePrefix''))]'
  
  # SQL Database Connection String Format
  sqlConnectionStringFormat: 'Server=tcp:{0}.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;'
  
resources:
  # App Service Plan
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: 2022-03-01
    name: '[variables(''appServicePlanName'')]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    sku:
      name: B1
      tier: Basic
      size: B1
      family: B
      capacity: 1
    properties:
      perSiteScaling: false
      elasticScaleEnabled: false
      maximumElasticWorkerCount: 1
      isSpot: false
      reserved: false # Set to true for Linux, false for Windows
      zoneRedundant: false
      kind: 'Windows' # Or 'Linux'
  
  # SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: '[variables(''sqlServerName'')]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    properties:
      administratorLogin: '[parameters(''sqlAdminLogin'')]'
      administratorLoginPassword: '[parameters(''sqlAdminPassword'')]'
      version: '12.0' # Represents Azure SQL Database V12
      minimalTlsVersion: '1.2' # Recommended for security
    
  # SQL Server Firewall Rule (Allow Azure Services to connect)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: '[format(''{0}/{1}'', variables(''sqlServerName''), ''AllowAllWindowsAzureIps'')]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Sql/servers'', variables(''sqlServerName''))]'
    properties:
      startIpAddress: '0.0.0.0'
      endIpAddress: '0.0.0.0' # This special rule allows all Azure services to connect
  
  # SQL Database
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: '[format(''{0}/{1}'', variables(''sqlServerName''), variables(''sqlDatabaseName''))]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Sql/servers'', variables(''sqlServerName''))]'
    sku:
      name: S0
      tier: Standard
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeGB: 250 # Default for S0
      
  # Storage Account
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2022-09-01
    name: '[variables(''storageAccountName'')]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: 'TLS1_2'
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      defaultToOAuthAuthentication: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: 'Allow' # Allows public access, can be restricted later
  
  # Web App
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: 2022-03-01
    name: '[variables(''webAppName'')]'
    location: '[parameters(''location'')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Web/serverfarms'', variables(''appServicePlanName''))]'
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases'', variables(''sqlServerName''), variables(''sqlDatabaseName''))]'
      - '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'', variables(''storageAccountName''))]'
    properties:
      serverFarmId: '[resourceId(''Microsoft.Web/serverfarms'', variables(''appServicePlanName''))]'
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          # SQL Database Connection String for your application
          - name: SQL_CONNECTION_STRING
            value: '[format(variables(''sqlConnectionStringFormat''), variables(''sqlServerName''), variables(''sqlDatabaseName''), parameters(''sqlAdminLogin''), parameters(''sqlAdminPassword''))]'
          
          # Storage Account Connection String for your application
          - name: AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
            value: '[format(''DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};AccountKey={1};EndpointSuffix={2}'', variables(''storageAccountName''), listKeys(resourceId(''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'', variables(''storageAccountName'')), ''2022-09-01'').keys[0].value, environment().suffixes.storage)]'
outputs:
  webAppUrl:
    type: string
    value: '[format(''https://{0}.azurewebsites.net'', variables(''webAppName''))]'
  sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId(''Microsoft.Sql/servers'', variables(''sqlServerName'')), ''2022-05-01-preview'').fullyQualifiedDomainName]'
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: '[variables(''storageAccountName'')]'
